   259→function buildProcessedData(transaction: PointsTransaction) {
   260→  const gainType = getTransactionGainType(transaction);
   261→  const formattedCurrencyValue = formatToCurrency(transaction.currencyValue);
   262→  const isMarketplace = !!transaction.marketplace;
   263→  const marketplace = transaction.marketplace;
   264→
   265→  const marketplaceValuePoints = marketplace?.valuePoints;
   266→  const formattedPointsValue =
   267→    marketplaceValuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceValuePoints !== null
   268→      ? `- ${getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace(marketplaceValuePoints)}`
   269→      : getFormattedPointsValue(transaction.amount, transaction.type);
   270→
   271→  const marketplaceTitle = getMarketplaceTitle(transaction);
   272→  const cardTitle = marketplaceTitle || transaction.description || '';
   273→  const highlightText = getFormattedHighlightText(transaction.date, gainType, moment);
   274→
   275→  let marketplaceContent: MarketplaceContentData | undefined;
   276→  if (isMarketplace && marketplace) {
   277→    const firstPayment = marketplace.payments?.[0];
   278→    const firstOrder = marketplace.orders?.[0];
   279→    const vendorName = firstOrder?.vendor || '';
   280→
   281→    const items: MarketplaceItemData[] = [];
   282→    marketplace.orders?.forEach(order => {
   283→      order.items?.forEach(item => {
   284→        items.push({
   285→          name: item.name,
   286→          quantity: item.quantity,
   287→          valuePoints: getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace(item.valuePoints),
   288→          imageUrl: item.imageUrl,
   289→          cleanedImageUrl: getCleanedImageUrl(item.imageUrl),
   290→        });
   291→      });
   292→    });
   293→
   294→    marketplaceContent = {
   295→      orderNumber: transaction.id,
   296→      status: transaction.status,
   297→      statusColor: transaction.status
   298→        ? STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'
   299→        : undefined,
   300→      paymentType: firstPayment ? getPaymentTypeLabel(firstPayment.paymentType) : undefined,
   301→      shippingValuePoints:
   302→        marketplace.shippingValuePoints !== undefined && marketplace.shippingValuePoints !== null
   303→          ? getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace(marketplace.shippingValuePoints)
   304→          : undefined,
   305→      valuePoints:
   306→        marketplace.valuePoints !== undefined && marketplace.valuePoints !== null
   307→          ? getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace(marketplace.valuePoints)
   308→          : undefined,
   309→      vendorName: vendorName || undefined,
   310→      items,
   311→    };
   312→  }
   313→
   314→  return {
   315→    cardTitle,
   316→    formattedPointsValue,
   317→    highlightText,
   318→    formattedCurrencyValue,
   319→    marketplaceContent,
   320→    showOrderNumber: !isMarketplace,
   321→    showStatus: !isMarketplace,
   322→    showValue: !isMarketplace,
   323→  };
   324→}

1→import React, { useState } from 'react';
     2→import { ScrollView, View, Pressable } from 'react-native';
     3→import {
     4→  Text,
     5→  Box,
     6→  CardPoints,
     7→  Header,
     8→  Icon,
     9→  SearchUsed,
    10→  SeparatorHorizontal,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
    13→import type { SDUIScreen } from '../services/sdui/models';
    14→import ScreenRenderer from '../services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer';
    15→import { registerAllAdapters } from '../services/sdui/adapters';
    16→import { useSDUIJsonEditor } from '../../.storybook/addons/json-editor';
    17→import {
    18→  extractHistoryLoaded,
    19→  extractHistoryEmpty,
    20→} from '../services/sdui/mocks';
    21→
    22→registerAllAdapters();
    23→
    24→type ViewState = 'loaded' | 'empty';
    25→
    26→const SCREENS: Record<ViewState, SDUIScreen> = {
    27→  loaded: extractHistoryLoaded,
    28→  empty: extractHistoryEmpty,
    29→};
    30→
    31→function ViewToggle({
    32→  selected,
    33→  onSelect,
    34→}: {
    35→  selected: ViewState;
    36→  onSelect: (v: ViewState) => void;
    37→}) {
    38→  const labels: Record<ViewState, string> = {
    39→    loaded: 'Loaded (8)',
    40→    empty: 'Empty',
    41→  };
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', gap: 8, marginBottom: 16 }}>
    45→      {(['loaded', 'empty'] as const).map(v => (
    46→        <Pressable
    47→          key={v}
    48→          onPress={() => onSelect(v)}
    49→          style={{
    50→            paddingHorizontal: 16,
    51→            paddingVertical: 8,
    52→            borderRadius: 20,
    53→            backgroundColor: selected === v ? '#6B2FBE' : '#E8E0F0',
    54→          }}
    55→        >
    56→          <Text
    57→            type="paragraphMDM"
    58→            color={selected === v ? 'LIGHT_BASE_01' : 'INTENSE_COLOR_05'}
    59→          >
    60→            {labels[v]}
    61→          </Text>
    62→        </Pressable>
    63→      ))}
    64→    </View>
    65→  );
    66→}
    67→
    68→function ExtractDemo() {
    69→  const [view, setView] = useState<ViewState>('loaded');
    70→  const screen = useSDUIJsonEditor(SCREENS[view]);
    71→
    72→  return (
    73→    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
    74→      <View style={{ padding: 24, maxWidth: 420 }}>
    75→        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
    76→          SDUI: Extrato
    77→        </Text>
    78→        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    79→          Renders the transaction history from JSON via SDUI engine. Transactions
    80→          use context interpolation — edit the JSON to change data dynamically.
    81→          Tab switching is visual-only — content filtering requires backend
    82→          support via separate context data per tab.
    83→        </Text>
    84→
    85→        <ViewToggle selected={view} onSelect={setView} />
    86→
    87→        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm">
    88→          <ScreenRenderer screen={screen} />
    89→        </Box>
    90→      </View>
    91→    </ScrollView>
    92→  );
    93→}
    94→
